Musically the concert is hailed as one of ‚Äô78‚Äôs best ‚Äì an explosive second set highlighted by Estimated, The Other One, Eyes of the World and soaring versions of Dire‚ÄØWolf, Franklin‚Äôs Tower and Wharf Rat, with only the closing Deal receiving mild criticism.

ai_rating.rationale: Over a dozen reviews uniformly rave about both performance and audio quality; the show is described as legendary while the soundboard source is called stunning, justifying an almost‚Äëperfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, dynamic mix with superb stereo imaging (Charlie Miller upgrade). Reviewers note ‚Äústunning audio quality,‚Äù ‚Äúsounds great,‚Äù and only minor board imperfections that don‚Äôt detract from the listening experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia‚Äôs playing is called blistering, haunting and "blood crazy," with a tone that could ‚Äúcut‚Äù through rock; his solos on Estimated and other jams are highlighted as extraordinary.
